title: Downscaled 2x
description: A resourcepack that downscales all minecraft textures by 2 times
body:
This resourcepack makes all minecraft textures downscaled by 2x. Downscaling a 16x16 (default for blocks and items) texture by 2x will make it 8x8 pixels. Downscaled textures have less details and **do** take less V-RAM, but it probably won't do any optimization, so this is just a visual thing.

[Downscaled 4x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/downscaled-4x)
